name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Saya berkunjung bersama 1 teman saya di jam 13.00 pd tgl 11/01/2026. Kami order food & beverage masing2 per person.

Sblmnya waitress memang sudah menginfokan terkait max duration table 2 jam, namun posisinya saat itu saya sedang on going meeting online dan blm selesai dalam 2 jam tsb.

Makanan & minuman kami jg belum selesai dimakan, namun waitress sdh menghampiri kami utk reminder table & close bill. Kami mengiyakan close bill tsb, namun kami jg jg memberitahu bahwa saya masih meeting & waitress bisa melihat sendiri kondisi di meja.

Waitress remind utk leave table krn katanya table sudah ditunggu oleh yg booking selanjutnya. Namun saat itu table di sekitar saya banyak yg kosong, waitress bahkan tidak menawarkan utk move ke table lain. Sayapun tdk melihat ada org yg menunggu di waiting area Publish.

Sgt mengecewakan utk restoran spt Publish yg mana harusnya service menjadi yg paling utama.

Saya sudah menyuarakan kekecewaan saya tsb via sosmed agar teman dan network saya tidak merasakan pengalaman yg sama. Ini jg pertama kali saya dipaksa keluar dr restoran, apalagi dgn posisi makanan blm habis & jelas2 saya sedang meeting.

Tolong agar server dapat diedukasi utk dapat melayani customer sesuai dengan kondisi yg ada, tidak terpaku pada rules.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:

I know rules are rules, but you could adjust on the situation I guess?? Very much disappointed. Never had i ever being kicked out of a restaurant, esp when I haven’t finish my meal. What an experience 😂

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Ambience: dim lighting with intimate and elegant vibe, great for a dinner with the family or friends. They also have private rooms.

Food:
1. Roasted Salmon: the salmon was perfectly roasted. It is soft topped with crispy skin. Served with baby potato that was tasty and kinda crispy on the outside too. All dipped in sort of a white butter sauce flavoured with dill, which was creamy, a bit herbal, and fresh.

2. Molten Lava Cake: One of the best lava cake in town! Once I cut the cake open, the chocolate just perfectly melted out. It was not too sweet, and not bitter at all. The chocolate had a bit saltiness so it had a rich balance between the sweetness and saltiness. Instead of vanilla, they served it with hazelnut gelato and it was to die for. The taste of hazelnut really stood out and paired really well with the lava cake.

3. Brie Toast with Truffle Honey: it was good, but a little more cheese would be better. And to have the honey dip was not a good fit I guess. Dipping the toast to the honey made it become too sweet. Better to just drizzle it on top.

4. Calamari Ring: just the right level of crunchiness, not greasy.

5. Vanilla Panna Cotta: the perfect dessert for those who are not sweet tooth. The sweetness in the vanilla pannacotta was just enough and is well balanced with the freshness of strawberry and the sorbet

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Publish continues to impress with every visit, not just for its food, but for the overall experience it creates. One of the charms of the restaurant is its thoughtfully designed interior — modern, warm, and effortlessly inviting. Tucked inside is a charming photobooth corner, a small but delightful touch that adds character and makes the space feel even more memorable.

What consistently stands out, however, is how well the restaurant balances comfort and sophistication. The staff embody the same warmth as the space itself: attentive without being intrusive, genuinely friendly, and clearly proud of the dishes they serve. Their service elevates the experience from simply “eating out” to actually feeling taken care of.

The menu is another highlight. Each dish is prepared with precision, using fresh, high-quality ingredients that shine through in both flavor and presentation. Whether you’re choosing something rich and satisfying or opting for a lighter option, the execution is consistently strong — vibrant flavors, thoughtful combinations, and plating that feels effortlessly elegant.

Publish works equally well for casual lunches, longer dinners, and everything in between. It’s the kind of place you return to not just because the food is good, but because the experience is reliably fulfilling. After multiple visits, it’s clear that this isn’t just a neighborhood spot — it’s one of the area’s standout dining destinations.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Honestly, I’ll never come back to this place again. I had a really bad experience with the security staff.

I was taking some photos and short TikTok videos in front of the restaurant because the spot was cute and aesthetic and before me there were also some people doing the same thing. I didn’t think it was a problem, especially since I paid to dine there, not just hanging around for free.

After finishing my photos, I was about to leave. Usually, the security guy always opens the door for customers who enter or exit, but when I was about to go out, he just stood there, didn’t even move or offer to help which honestly I didn’t mind, I can open the door myself.

But when I politely asked, “Mas, ini pintunya dibuka ke arah mana ya?” (because it was a pull door and he was standing right in front of it), he answered so rudely, just said “Gatau” with an unpleasant tone and expression.

I really don’t know what I did wrong. Did I disturb him just because I took some photos? If taking photos is such a big issue here, maybe put a big sign saying “NO PHOTOS ALLOWED” instead of treating customers like trash.

Such an awful, disrespectful experience. Totally ruined my mood. Never coming back here again.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
The restaurant has some notable positives, including its attractive building, convenient location, and well-considered design. The furniture is comfortable, and the clean bathrooms add to the pleasant environment. The menu features a diverse selection of food and beverages, and the food plating is visually appealing.

However, several issues detracted from the experience. The staff in the parking lot were unprofessional and made us uncomfortable by talking while smoking. Inside, the waitress appeared distracted, providing a poor level of service and struggling to answer questions about the menu. The cleanliness of the dining area was also an issue, with food remnants under the table. The dishes themselves were underwhelming: the pumpkin in the salad was soggy, the calamari was over-battered and had an off-putting smell, the spaghetti aglio e olio was excessively oily and lacked authentic flavor, and the wagyu ribeye was bland and not properly cooked. Compared to nearby restaurants with similar offerings and prices, this establishment did not meet expectations and felt overrated.

Dear Publish Gunawarman, you need to address these issues to align your staff and food quality with the overall potential of the restaurant. Because I think the staff isnt even ready to serve customers in general.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
I would call this: A Delightful New Dining Experience

I recently had the pleasure of dining at a newly opened restaurant in Gunawarman that has quickly become one of my favorite spots in town. From the moment I walked in, the ambience set the stage for a truly memorable experience. The decor is modern yet warm, creating an inviting atmosphere that makes you want to settle in and enjoy every moment.

The attention to detail extends beyond just the decor. The cutlery and glassware were of exceptional quality, adding a touch of elegance to the dining experience. It's clear that the restaurant has put thought into every aspect of the customer experience, making it a cut above the rest.

The menu offers a variety of delicious options, and everything we tried was simply outstanding. We started with the honey-baked pumpkin salad, which was both refreshing and flavorful—truly a delightful combination. The calamari was perfectly crunchy, providing a satisfying bite with every piece.

For the mains, we were blown away by the wagyu tenderloin. It was incredibly tender, practically melting in your mouth with each bite. The cabonara pizza was another highlight—light yet rich, with thick, melting cheese that was just irresistible. The seafood spaghetti aglio olio was the star of the show, perfectly cooked with just the right balance of flavors, making it the champ of the lovely afternoon.

The service was equally impressive—attentive, excellent, and highly knowledgeable. The staff were not only kind but also knew the menu inside and out, providing thoughtful recommendations and ensuring that every detail was taken care of throughout our meal.

To top it all off, the restaurant serves excellent coffee. We tried both the Americano and the latte, and both were perfectly brewed, rounding out the meal on a high note.

Despite the high quality of the food, service, and overall experience, the prices were surprisingly reasonable. It's rare to find such an exceptional dining experience without breaking the bank, but this restaurant manages to deliver on all fronts.

Overall, this new restaurant offers a top-notch dining experience. i highly recommend it for anyone looking to enjoy a fantastic meal in a wonderful setting.

this is my second time here. pengalaman pertama cukup oke and the food was amazing. kmrn kesini lagi order katsu sando (karena ini yg direkomen org2 ig) dengan harga 185k before tax. dgn harga segini i expect beef ygg tender dan juicy ya. ternyata dateng2 keras banget bgt sampe dipotong pun susah. ngunyah dan telennya jg susah sekali:” utk rotinya oke aja. di description ada caramelized onion tp dtg2 cuma ada bbrp helai. bener2 menyedihkan si utk ukuran makanan 200k after tax.

lebih sedih lagi, saat kita panggil waitressnya (not to complain), waitressnya bales dgn agak ketus “memang dagingnya medium kok”. terus kita bingung…medium dari mana? ini uda WELL DONE bahkan. terus kita blg “ini keras bgt kak, susah dipotong”, malah dibales “mau kita bikin well done aja?”.

akhihrnya kita memutuskan untuk yauda lah males berkepanjangan. utkk restoran sekelas publish, we expect MINIMAL waitressnya merespon dengan baik dan “kami coba tanyakan ke chefnya ya kak, mohon maaf sebelumnya”.

I’d definitely recommend this place to others.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Dining at Publish Gunawarman feels like you’ve stepped into the living room of someone quietly super rich haha. The vibe was sleek, warm interiors, marble floors, and elegant lighting all set the tone for a meal that feels both elegant and cozy. It’s homey but polished, with that kind of effortless cool that makes you want to move in and live there forever.

The Wagyu Katsu Sando was an instant standout for me. It was crispy, juicy, and indulgent in a nice balanced way. After that, the Crab Butter Linguine was a nice punchy zesty umami, and a generous portion of sweet lump crab. The Brie Toast with Truffle Honey was simple but absolutely addictive: melty, creamy cheese on crunchy toast, poured over with sweet truffly honey. The "bossam-style" crackling pork belly was another winner. Unlike bossams, the pork had fried crackling skin. But it was still very much juicy, and paired well with the sauces and veggies.

The duck curry noodles, calamari, and pizza were fine tbh but probably not special enough for me to order again next time. They were still decent enough to finish, just not the kind of dishes I’d race back for.

Overall, Publish hits a sweet spot. It had exciting flavors, refined yet welcoming space, and dishes that punch way above your usual asian western fusion cafes. It’s not cheap, but it feels like money well spent. I left full and impressed. Def a decent enough place to back to.

I had high expectations for this place, but unfortunately, the experience was disappointing. The staff were not only unfriendly but outright rude. When I asked questions, they responded with indifference and a harsh tone, making me feel unwelcome.

As for the food, it was nothing special—just average. Given the prices, I don’t think it was worth it. If the restaurant had a great atmosphere or impressive décor, it might have justified the cost, but the space felt bland and uninspired.

Overall, it wasn’t a pleasant experience. Would I return? Absolutely not, especially considering how rude the staff were. To top it off, they charged a 10% service fee, which felt completely unjustified given the poor service.

review_text: Saya mau menceritakan pengalaman tadi malam ketika saya menghadiri acara ulang tahun teman saya , saya ingin menceritakan bahwa sangat kecewa sebagai tamu , apa lagi yang punya acara di karenakan , dengan effort teman saya yang dekor sendiri , hingga saya ikt membantu dekor sebelum acara di mulai , tdk ada 1 pun staff disana yang memberikan bantuan , atau menyanyakan butuh bantuan apa , padahal ketika sampai disana , saya melihat kondisi sangat sepi dan belum banyak pengunjung datang , padahal acara itu di hadiri banyak orang , saya cukup kaget karena dengan pengalaman saya yang sering datang ke acara dengan tamu undangan 20-30 orang biasanya akan ada orang yg selalu standby , tetapi untuk pelayanan sangat kurang sendiri , bahkan tdk ada staff yg standby utk melayani customer , dan sebelumnya itu di adakan di ruangan vip ( private room ) , yang dmana harusnya ada staff yang standby karena kita tau bahwa untuk memesan vip room / private room. Akan di kenakan minimum order , dan ketika saya masuk tdk ada 1 org pun staff yang menyapa saya , bukan kita sebagai customer gila hormat tapi itu mnrt saya adalah hal basic , dmana kita yang tdk harus menyanyakan acara si A dmana , acara si B dmana? Atau dtg berapa orang , kita seperti masuk ke warung. Yang tinggal duduk. Saya me review ini karena kasian melihat teman dekat saya yang membuat acara , dan harus melayani teman2 nya , sehingga harus membawa art sendiri utk membantu, jujur saya pun ikt sedih karena kita sebagai customer harus membawa art kita sendiri untuk membantu melayani tamu2 undangan nya. Bayangkan kalian yang harus keluar uang untuk ke restoran , tetapi kalian sendiri yang harus melayani diri sendiri dmana kita harus membayar tax and SERVICE yang tdk kita dapatkan. Ku harap dengan adanya review ini , pihak restoran dapat berbenah dalam memperbaiki pelayanannya , mnrt saya utk makanan ok , tapi untuk service dalam melayani tamu saya beri score 0.5 dari 10. Bukan bermaksud dalam memberikan bad review , tapi kalian harus tau , orang merayakan hal special untuk mengabadikan moment bahagia , dan saya ikt merasakan perasaan teman saya , karena pasti kita ingin meberikan terbaik untuk diri kita sendiri dan tamu2 undangan yang kita undang . Mungkin ini jadi pengalam pertama saya dtg ke tempat ini dan terakhir juga saya akan datang kemari. Walaupun saya suka makanannya , tetapi sangat tdk untuk service nya. Semoga team dr publish bsa membaca keluhan dr kita sebagai customer n berbenah. Sekian dan terima kasih

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
A new spot in this area. The place is spacious, with both indoor and outdoor seating for smokers. The menu offers a variety of options, and while it’s not cheap, similar to other restaurants in the area, the food is delicious. Before coming here, we read some mixed reviews, but we decided to give it a try anyway.

Perhaps the downside is that it's quite crowded, so it’s not the best place if you’re looking for a quiet spot. Many people come here for gatherings, so it gets pretty noisy. Also, the serving time was quite long, our food took almost 40 minutes to arrive, though it wasn’t full house. This might not be ideal if you’re really hungry, but it wasn’t a big issue for us since we weren’t starving.

The steak was genuinely good. The staff were attentive, and the service was great. Overall, nothing significant to complain about.

The service was alright, but I was shocked when they told me I could only stay for two hours, especially when it didn't seem like the place was packed. This feels like a place where people are meant to hang out and stay a while, so it feels very inappropriate to cap the time we can stay. Although we ended up staying more than 2 hours, it left a sour taste in my mouth when I was told that upon entry.

The non smoking seating was disappointing. You had the choice of an extremely cramped noisy area, or an are that didn't have a lot of natural lighting. There's a sunroom area with a lot of natural light and was spacious too, but it's exclusively a smoking area, so if you want to have a decent seat you'd have to endure the cigarette smells.

Overall was quite disappointed with my visit.

Suddenly 3-4 hours later i felt burning sensation all over my body!! Came up with itchy feeling, redness + swallowing up my fingers & face and i ended up at emergency hospital until the next day 😭😭😭
Def the most HORRIFYING & TRAUMATIC experience i ever felt in my entire life!!! 😢😢
Beyond disappointed of the food’s quality.. please fix it or change the menu if you can’t maintain the freshness of the ingredients tho.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
I understand why people wanted to check this restaurant. Its the minimal modern aesthetic. It is definitely clean, well lit and instagrammable. The food was not at all mind blowing, it was above than average. Prices are reasonable for its taste. Everything on the menu is a combo of "classic" cafe menu and not yet fully committed full blown restaurant. Serves Eastern and Western food.

The servers were very attentive and warm. We ordered from the lunch special menu. We came in around 11:20 am and first ordered came at 12:05pm, allowing us to wait for almost half an hour, no complimentary snacks were served, usually you would expect a resto like this would have a bread and some olive oil, balsamic vinegar or butter while waiting, but none of that. We finished the drink before first order came. Same as we finished the first meal and the second order came 17 minutes after. It was a long time to wait between meals considering that the restaurant was not full. I can imagine waiting for more than an hour if the resto gets full. They gave us a small snack as a complimentary for making us wait at the end. Should have given us that while we wait for our food. Also would appreciate them offering another plate when they serve one serving for two people. We do hope staff would be attentive to small details like this. Also as a suggestion to loose the posters that was put on the window. They make your resto looks cheap.  Would we come back again after this experience? I dont think we will. Would we recommend it? No we will not. It was a good lunch though.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Ordered the pumpkin salad, pizza Provençal, roasted half baby chicken, and molten lava cake.

Salad was good, but could use more salt. Would’ve loved more to see more pumpkin and more char on the pumpkin. Yoghurt brought a nice balance to the sweet pumpkin. One of the better salads we’ve had.

The pizza was really disappointing: the dough was undercooked in the middle, bacon had no crunch, and the tomato sauce was really sweet. The caramelized onions added a lot of sweetness to an already sweet pizza. Would not recommend ordering unless they do major overhaul to the balance of the pizza.

Half baby chicken was even more disappointing. We initially didn’t realize it was half of a baby chicken, so we expected a much larger portion. The baby chicken looked crispy, but the skin was still a bit undercooked and the chicken was unevenly seasoned. The sauce/gravy was good, but definitely on the sweeter side. Could use more salt.
We expected to be blown away, especially with a high price point (IDR 175k), but came away extremely disappointed. 75% of the plate was filled with French fries. Do not recommend ordering this at all.

The chocolate lava cake was undoubtedly the highlight of the meal. The cake was nice and crispy, while the chocolate core/sauce was absolutely stunning. We loved that there was a noticeable saltiness to the cake, as it enhanced the chocolate flavor. Hazelnut ice cream was also delicious. The cake was so good we ordered two of them.

Overall, the restaurant has high potential. The ambience was great, but the food is severely underperforming. At current condition, would only go again for the dessert.

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Hi Publish Group,
Is it a coincidence, that the vast majority of your 5*-star reviews comes from fresh accounts, that never rated any other business before (outside venues of your very own company)…..or is it possible, that you’re using bot accounts (with the help of your own employees, family & friends) to fake your own rating up? 🤔
Is it possible that you took your name “Publish” a little too serious and translated it into “publish your own 5*-star reviews to be on top of the list.🤥
Shouldn’t a credible restaurant achieve its reputation by convincing “real” guests with outstanding foods & services?
So many questions raised….I’m curious to hear some statements from the owner 😁

With Regards and a healthy dose of skepticism

Oh ya….Food, Service & Ambience were mediocre at best…

name: Publish Gunawarman
review_text:
Publish Jakarta is a stylish new restaurant offering an impressive mix of Western and Eastern cuisine. I tried their "Publish on a Plate" set menu and loved the flavorful starters like the Brie Toast with Truffle Honey and Roasted Grape and Burrata Salad.

The mains were equally memorable, with highlights including the rich Crab Butter Linguine, spicy Chorizo Carbonara, and melt-in-your-mouth Saikyo Miso Black Cod. For dessert, the Molten Lava Cake and Apple Croissant Tart were standout choices.

With its elegant ambiance and delicious menu, Publish Jakarta is a must-visit for food lovers. Recommended!

The place itself has a cozy and warm ambience. They've a pleasant table & seating arrangement, spacious, so it's very comfortable. It'd make having conversations not overwhelming even if the resto's crowded. Also good and just enough lighting. Please keep it up 🫶🏻

Food was delish!! good portion, they're presented well and their pasta's amazing. They had varied selection of beverages too. We just had a casual, catching-up dinner but I think it would be a great place for special occasions too, whether in big groups or intimate.

(Untuk saran, mungkin kedepannya tolong diperhatikan piringnya kalau ada pecahan/retakan jgn dipakai lagi, although for me its not rlly a big deal + considering how great the overall experience is 😊)

review_text:
Went here for a late lunch and catching up with some friends. Had a great time here, with current visit count: 2 and counting.

Had katsudon and it really hit the spot for me, mildly seasoned and comforting yet still flavorful for me. Portion was on the bigger side, but fits me well. If they can maintain their katsu's crispiness, that would be superb. I like that they serve iced americano here for the non-sugary beverage options and i'm a fan. Their alcoholic beverages are great (the infamous highball, negroni, and juniper sling could be a safe bet).

Service and atmosphere were also nice here. Relatively easy reservations were made as long as it's not busy hours. Great, knowledgeable staffs if you're not sure what to order. Will definitely come back for more

as for the drinks, standard, cause we only ordered basic non alc drinks. the food on the other hand, you can take the seasoning down just a smidge. it's honestly great, but the first one (the one we thought was too salty) had too much seasoning. broth powder i assume? regardless if people never complained then i guess it's just an us problem. once again if our server wasnt as good, i wouldnt give this plsce a 5/5. it's all thanks to the experience.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
The place is very eye-pleasing, good choice of music, great food and cocktails, and the waitresses are very helpful!

Unfortunately (maybe) by the time I got there, the place was in high-demand for reservations, so it was limited to 2 hours per reservation. Oh, I was a little surprised when the waitress informed there's no non-alcoholic menu above 7PM.

Tried the Chicken Katsudon and it's 10 out of 10 for me because all the composition feels right. The chicken katsu is wrapped in sauce but still crispy. The portions are just right for me, not too much and not too little. Worth the price!

And Suika Highball, a cocktail of suntory whiskey with caramel syrup and a touch of lemon and soda makes the taste unique. It's very light when drunk, the taste of all the ingredients is balanced, and the smell also makes it sizzle.

Overall 4/5 and definitely will come back for a chill drink and chats.

review_text: foods, services, ambience all great!! they said houma feels like home and i totally agree!! very nice place to spend with your partner, friends, or even a “me time”. they provide books for u to read, vinyls for u to listen and etc. the toilet is sooo clean and the things there are so complete omg they even provide cotton buds and pads. all the staffs also very kind and helpful, especially Mas Farhat, thumbs up. but an advice from me, i think you should add more modern vinyls, i mean mostly all the vinyls there are music from 70s, perhaps you can add vinyls from artists nowadays:)) (i suggest you to add billie eilish please hehe)

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
This place is homey! I instantly fell in love with the place. My waiter, mbak Yayan, is very attentive and welcoming. Their chicken katsudon is perfect to my taste. Coffee is also good.

it's a great place for anything.
If you need some time alone, they have a collection of books, comics, vinyls, enough to be immersed in your own world.

it's also a great place for couples, few seating next to the windows are perfect for couple

cool enough to bring friends for hangouts.

Although parking is still challenging as many places within these area.

I definitely save this place in my bookmarks.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: The food was okay, the place had a nice atmosphere, but the staff was being so weird about the menu on the table. They kept taking the menu away when we still needed it, and we had to ask a few times for it. My friend was still reading it when one of the staff came to us and took our menu, saying she needed to 'borrow it' and would give it back when my friend was clearly still choosing on what to eat. Yet, they never gave us back the menu, so we had to look up the menu online because we couldn't be bothered to ask again

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
The food was wonderful it tasted very nice. Some are a bit saltier for others but some are a bit bland (u can ask for salt and pepper if you need to adjust). However, i had a few slight issue with the service. There was quite a bit of miscommunication. For example, when i came in and ordered my food to one waitress. Another waiter tried to take my order again (weird but passable). Another issue is that when i asked for salt and pepper to one of the staff when my food came, the staff said she would gladly help me. However, she went back to her station and waited a solid 10-15 mnts doing nothing (not sure why). When i glanced at her and she noticed, thats when she ACTUALLY grabbed the salt and pepper and gave it to me (the salt shaker didn't actually work). There is more. When i asked for an extra seat for 3 people, they didn't give me any and my friend had to grab it myself. Look, i dont expect a service of a 5 star restaurant, but at the very least if we are paying you 11% of our bill (the food was expensive) as your service fee have better service! Oh and another issue i had was how the parking fee was 10k for motorcycle when the parking staff didn't even help us get out of our parking spot and leave. The parking spot wasn't even a proper one, it was one by the streets. I understand this is in the middle of a central business district but our cash pay your wage regardless! Please fix your service and take your job seriously!
On a side note, i didnt give this place the worst review because the food was decent and the atmosphere was one of the best in town.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Place and vibe is good, temprature is set to make you feel comfortable. Drinks are so so, it's ok.

However please educate the valet service guys, it was raining, and they asked me to get mycar by myself (100 metres distance). I don't really understand whether valet people are actually part of the place or not, but it's there. So they gotta take care of it.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
kita udah coba kasih feedback ke pelayannya:
- kita reservasi 9 orang tapi gak dikasih 9 kursi
- kita dari awal pesen 2 nasi tapi keluar setelah 1 jam 30 menit
- waktu minta kursi tambahan karena ada temen yg dateng telat dari 9 kursi reservasi itu, pelayan nya ga mau ngasih katanya makanya lain kali reservasi

review_text: Tempatnya enak tapi lampunya terlalu redup di siang hari untuk baca menu. Kami perlu senter untuk penerangan saat baca menu dan lihat bentuk makanannya. Selebihnya OK, we had fun!

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
If you ate looking for some place to talk and enjoy drinks with nice music in the background, THIS IS NOT THE PLACE.

well it’s also my fault not knowing that listening bar is a bar that it’s pretty much like a regular bar, but with a trowelling of extra noise BUT ALSO providing an obscure record you’re not hip enough to know. While Houma only served basic-south jakarta-tier chart music.

they really need to step up their game to the title “listening bar”

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Awful service. 3 of us came around 7pm and got our best spot table near the band area. The staff said we only have 2 hours coz our table was reserved for another guest. so I asked, what if I order more and want to stay more than 2 hrs, will you find me another table? they said, they will.

and yes. they don't. they're also confused where to moved us. in the end, they moved us to a bench with no table at all. like sitting in the bus shelter. LOL and no one is arrived and sit in our previous table. they kicked us and force us to move and close the bill. hahaha

We ordered mocktail, sold out. We ordered Iced lychee tea, sold out. Finally we ordered sprite, monster pizza (don't expect it'll like a monsterous big) and 3 other main dishes. We also plan to ordered cocktail after that. BUT since the 2hours weird regulation, we need to move to uncomfortable bench. so we decided to leave.

They have good atmosphere. but please. fix your 2 hrs regulation coz it doesn't make sense. you guys are losing sales opportunity.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Great music, foods are so so and but pricey. Less ciggarette smell would be much better

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Ambience + live music oke, hanya saya dari banyaknya menu makanan dan minuman hanya sedikit yang tersedia terutama kopi

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Visited this place with my friends while on vacation in Jakarta and can highly recommend this bar. Service was great, food was awesome and the drinks very nice. Very interesting concept that I have never seen like this before. It's quite cozy but elegant at the same time.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Berlokasi di Gunawarman Keb. Baru, cafè inj terletak di lantai 2 bangunan pojok - bawahnya resto Jepang tapi ga mampir..
Houma atmospherenya enak remang-remang syahdu, dannn takjub sama konsepnya yang asik artsy gitu..
Ada banyak pajangan, meja sekaligus rak buku juga menginspirasiku sekali. Pojokannya kayaknya bisa buat perform gitu dan banyak pajangan seru-serunya..
Memang secara luas bangunan gak gede banget, tapi muat untuk sekitar 30 orang dengan nyaman, kami tadi bikin acara mini workshop gitu bukan yang duduk-duduk kerja biasa ..
Buat makanan karena udah disiapin panitia & pihak Houma ya aku milih yang kesukaan, kebetulan ada menu mac n cheese dan enak! Ada taburan garlic dan so creamy gitu..
Temen lain pada pesan mie dng topping daging, ada yang omurice juga
Minumnya sih banyak pilihan
Pelayanan ramah-ramah dan gercep
Trusss.. toiletnya juga bersih selalu wangi (penting)
So far asik ke tempat ini!

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Listening bar satu ini cocok bagi kalian yang gak suka jedag-jedug kayak saya. Konsepnya dining & listening bar. Interiornya unik, makanannya enak, dan minumannya so-so lah. Saya pesan cafe latte, nya; rasanya kurang berasa kopi, kurang enak. Tapi makannya cukup enak, saya pesan fish & chips, sangat oke! Cocktailnya lumayan lah, tapi gak begitu spesial (avail di jam 11 malam). Yang dihighlight dari tempat ini adalah listening bar nya. Ada beberapa spot listening buat kamu yang mau denger lagu pake vinyl (mostly genre musiknya jazz) & buku-buku yg bisa kamu baca. Kalo malam ada live musicnya. Vibe nya comfy, meski lagi full tapi gak begitu sesak.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Semi eatery lounge with indie hipster vibe to it. Listening section available for you to sip on drinks while perusing their vinyl collections. Drinks focusing mainly on japanese highballs.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: One of the best listening space in Jakarta, good ambience and the waiters are so friendly ☺️

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Dapat pengalaman buruk di Houma, pengunjung table lain menumpahkan minuman yang saya pesan belum diminum, sehingga mengenai celana saya sampai basah, tetapi Reaksi Waitersnya hanya diam dan tidak membantu apalagi memberikan respon negatif seperti memberikan kompensasi ketidaknyamanan, sangat tidak profesional untuk sekelas Bar di Gunawarman, tempat lain tidak seperti ini pelayanannya

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Overpriced and poncy, service below average, in fact the staff are less than helpful (my partner had a sore throat but they refused to give her a glass of hot water) but the music was good.

I'd say people go here to say they've been here rather than what it actually offers.

Food portions are small and overpriced, they basically serve indomie and charge 100,000 rupiah for the privilege.

There are far better options in Jakarta that provide a much better quality of experience.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Cozy place, suitable for both group and solo (tried both). Interesting selection of cocktails, although leaning more towards the sweet side. Cute interior and all.

Can be quite packed on weekend, but that doesn’t ruin the vibe as the crowds are pretty chill.

Pick the listening corner with record players if you want to enjoy some me-time. Ask the waiter for a headphone and pick a vinyl record to play. Their collection mainly includes jazz, soul, and R&B.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Great place and great band on saturday night!
I recommend you book a table if you want to go over the weekend.
Drink is amazing, they ensure the quality of the drink and the amount of alcohol.
No beer here, but various of alcohol served here

If you drive, you can use the valet service both cater for fujin and cantinero

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Very nice ambience, good experience as well with the mini library and songs. Ordered mac and cheese with a regular highball, mac and cheese was absolutely delicious. The highball tastes like every other highball, should order their special for a uniquely tasting one.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
thought it was a cool looking place, but the service was awful. came with my family (there were 4 of us) it was a weekend and it was a bit crowded. i was given the menu by the bar. right after i ordered a coffee, a mocktail, and a serving of pancakes, i was told there were no tables available (but in fact there was a table that was empty) so we decided to sit by the bar. the drinks came out in 10mins, only to be told by the manager that the bar was reserved, then i stated to the manager (her) that i had no table to properly eat my pancakes (which hadn’t come out in 30mins) then she proceeds to give me no solution, and not even an apology for the inconvenience. i had to go back and forth with the manager and one of the waitresses on the open table.

my family and i were left standing with our drinks. it was a mess. so i asked them to cancel my pancake order due to not having a table to eat it on, but was replied with “udah dimasukin ordernya kak, jd gabisa cancel” while they could not even provide me with a table. after another 10mins of just waiting (standing) for a solution (the pancakes still hadn’t come out) they suddenly decided that it was okay to cancel my order. i paid for the drinks and left very disappointed and unsatisfied.

review_text: Highly recommended! Salah satu restoran yang konsepnya kusuka banget. Dia seating areanya gak terlalu banyak, tapi somehow terasa homey. Tempatnya dingiiin, indoor smoking, dan wifi kenceng. Pelayanannya juga okkk banget, mas & mbaknya considerate semua. Their foods is chefs kiss! Harganya gak sepricey tempat minum/lounge lain, tapi porsinya oke dan rasanya enak. Dan disini juga gak ada minimum order which i love 🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻 Dinner berdua (2 drinks, 2 main course, and 1 appetizer) habis 300-350ish with tax! Worth to visit! 🙌🏻

review_text: I like the vibes. You can listen to old vinyl or enjoying the live performance while grabbing drink and snack. When I arrived at the bar, the rain start pouring, made the ambience and my listening experience more enjoyable.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Great ambience. Can try the vinyl player as long as you can. The orange cocktail is best!

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Tucked in the corner in Senopati area, Houma is one of the coolest bars in town to hang out and to soak yourself into this 90s vibe!

I don't particularly find the cocktails are good. I had this Nula gin-based fizzy cocktail, but not my thing. I should've sticked to my normal choices like negroni or something dry.

But the service and a whole ambience exceeds the expectations. If you can't stand on smokers, probably not the best place.

If you sit by the window, you can distant yourself from smokers, and you can be submerged into the music of your choice. They can hand you a headset, and you can plug in the turntable. Their jazz collection is quite handful.

Good to stay here in the rainy day!

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
Good atmosphere great location,
You can also experience the LP here, their dessert & beverages are also good.
Houma is in the second floor while the izakaya down stairs of them.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text:
It is just too bad that they do not sell beers. At least, curated ones to have, from home brewers.
Apart from that, this was my first time and I am instantly in love with the vibe.
A really cool place!

review_text: Fun bar to hang out even if you're a non-drinker. Place is nicely curated with trinkets and other modern pop culture decorations. One complaint is beware of the car parking as it has very limited space even with the valet service.

name: Houma Jakarta
review_text: Have to say the play has a nice vibe, the bartender is friendly and the drinks are nice. Came here on monday afternoon to enjoy couple of drinks and their vinyl collection. Will try their live music next!

Dateng ke sini pas rame banget, tapi gak dibatesin pengunjungnya ataupun table depan panggubg dj gak dikurangin. Biasanya di bar2 lain kalau ada artis ngisi acara dan rame bakal dikurangin table depan buat hemat space.

Kejadian gak menyenangkan ada pengunjung menarik tangan saya, dan saat saya keluar saya lihat jam tangan saya sudah tidak ada. Lapor ke cs untuk progress lost n found berakhir dighosting, berharap kalau memang tidak ketemu tetap diberikan kabar tidak ketemu.

Kejadian buruk lainnya juga tetap sama pengunjung yang rata2 kurang sopan. Saya sudah pakai dress code mereka yg memberi tanda bahwa saya tidak mau "diganggu" atau berkenalan lawan jenis, tapi tetap digoda dsb. Mungkin bisa dipasang di dpn pintu ttg aturan dresscode tsb.

Mungkin karna lelah atau rame, saya minta tolong untuk ice bucket gak dibantu2 beberapa kali minta, tapi secara keseluruhan staff humble dan ramah.

review_text: One of not so many bars or clubs that doesn't play EDM or any other kind of music that you'd normally found in other bars/clubs. Instead they played rock, alternative, or other rock genres. They also host some of the coolest partys and karaoke nights. The atmosfer in Duck Down is pretty wild, sticker bombed wall, people writings on their toilet walls and random places around the vicinity. The pricing is quite decent and their selection of beverages is spot on. Since Duck Down is the one of the hippest place in Jakarta, expect the place to be fully packed in pretty much any day of the week.

The only downsides… it is overcrowded on weekends, too much smokes (poor air circulation system), and recently the crowd is too young (bocil SMA). Not as good as before.

But overall I love this place. Rock on!

review_text:
If it is your first time here, the place is quite hidden, it is located in the basement. On the weekend, it's packed, mostly teenagers. The bar brands itself as a rock and roll themed bar yet not exclusively playing rock music all the time, occasional oldies pop tunes are being played as well. There are a variety of choices for drinks with south jakartans price (i.e. 80k ish for small local beer) but limited choices of food.
It's a small space and the staff are quite pushy to ask you to buy drinks which makes me quite uncomfortable.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text: An OG spot. The classic one. Long before many of the fancier dining places started popping up in Jakarta. I still treat this place as something special for its ambiance and the memories of my younger days. It’s become a December ritual for me whenever I’m in Jakarta and not traveling abroad. Always go for the crispy skin salmon!

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text:
Union is one of those places that never disappoints. No matter which branch you visit, the quality is always consistent-and this Plaza Senayan outlet is no exception.
The chicken steak is well-executed: juicy and tender inside with a nicely seasoned exterior, paired perfectly with crispy fries. Simple, comforting, and done right.
The Long John is a classic favorite-soft, airy bread generously filled and topped with chocolate shavings. Rich but balanced, and always satisfying. The ikura cream cheese dipping chips were a great addition - crispy chips with a rich, creamy dip, and the pop of salty ikura really elevates the flavor. A perfect snack-style dish to share. Their crab & prawn pasta is another highlight. The pasta is cooked al dente, generously coated in a creamy sauce with real seafood flavor. The sweetness of the crab and prawns comes through nicely, making it indulgent without being overwhelming.
Overall, Union remains a reliable choice for both savory dishes and desserts. Always delicious, always consistent, and definitely a place you can come back to again and again.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text:
⭐ 3/5 – Great Food, But Service Needs Improvement

I visited Union Plaza Senayan on the afternoon of 28 November 2025 and ordered several dishes including Salmon Croquettes, Escargot, Umami Burger Pork, Salmon Seaweed Bowl, Red Velvet Cake, CK Cheese Cake, and iced teas.

From a food perspective, everything was excellent.
The escargot was flavorful and buttery, the salmon croquettes were crispy with a creamy filling, and the Umami Burger was juicy with well-seasoned fries. The Salmon Seaweed Bowl was fresh, balanced, and fulfilling. Both cakes—the Red Velvet and Cheese Cake—were delicious and lived up to Union’s reputation. Drinks were also refreshing.

However, the service was quite disappointing.
Despite ordering escargot, the staff did not provide any sharing plates until I asked. There was a candle on the table that was never lit, even though other tables seemed to have theirs set up nicely. I came dressed properly and respectfully, yet the attention given to my table felt noticeably less than what other guests received.

Additionally, even when I asked for my unfinished cake to be taken away, the staff did not provide a paper bag until I specifically requested one. It’s unfortunate that such a simple gesture required asking, rather than being offered proactively—especially in a restaurant of this standard. This lack of awareness and attentiveness from the staff left a negative impression.

Overall, the food was great, but I hope the service can be more consistent, attentive, and welcoming to all guests

review_text:
15 Nov 2025, waiting list 13 antrian di Union Plaza Senayan dan infonya akan di telp jika meja sudah ready. Setelah 1 jam saya tunggu telp dari Union dan tidak ada yg telp menelfon saya sama sekali. Saya coba inisiatif untuk telf union ps untum menanyakan WL saya namun dj REJECT. akhirnya saya datang lsg untuk cek WL saya & informasi dari staff nya Nama saya sudah kelewat jauh & infonya mereka sudah telp saya BERKALI KALI namun tdk bisa dihubungi.

bagaimana tidak bs dihubungi? hp saya selalu stby & available untuk ditelp. even saya sendiri juga coba telp union lsg untuk menanyakan WL saya, tp di reject.

saya tanya, kalian menghubungi saya di jam brp? namun tidak digubris oleh staff kalian & mereka malah menunjukan ke kami, dgn cara telp ke nomor hp saya dan tidak tersambung.

saya merasa aneh & janggal. kok bisa tidak tersambung padahal hp saya available, sinyal ada, dan tdk knp2.

lalu saya suruh staff anda untuk telpon ke nomor teman saya yg lain & turns out SAMA JUGA TIDAK MASUK & TIDAK NYAMBUNG.

apakah memang sengaja?! atau udah disetting eh kalian agar telp union tidak bisa menelpon keluar?!

saya ada disamping telpon UNION lsg, ga masuk akal kalo nomor saya & nomor teman saya ga bisa dihubungin. kalo memang bukan akal2an kalian.

selang bbrp detik, muncul lg another customer yg menanyakan ttg WL dia & lagi lagi alasannya SAMA PERCIS dengan saya yaitu : WL kakak sudah kelewat jauh & dihubungin ga bisa.

dan the way staff kalian merespon kami & org lain yg sedang menanyakan waiting listnya, bnr2 sangat menyepelekan.

lol auto blacklist union PS.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text:
Union Brasserie and Bar @ Plaza Senayan

Atmosphere: Located inside Plaza Senayan . One of the earliest cafe that opens in Senayan. It opens at 7:00am Jakarta time. It’s popular with cyclists and runners for post workout breakfast much like Monolog in the same vicinity.

Service: Staff were friendly and able to provide tailored recommendations .

Food: Ordered their avo, egg, scallion chilli butter, salt bagel and chilli oil. The bagel was chewy, soft and well seasoned. All the ingredients came together nicely. Paired it with a cap and a black.

Highly recommended for an easy, relaxing Sunday morning. Watching local Jakartans wake up to go about their weekend working out and enjoying the time with their family and friends.

Price: IDR 200k or MYR 53 plus per person

Google: 4.6

Brasserie et Bar Union @ Plaza Senayan

Ambiance : Situé sur la Plaza Senayan. L'un des premiers cafés de Senayan. Il ouvre à 7h, heure de Jakarta. Il est très apprécié des cyclistes et des coureurs pour un petit-déjeuner après l'entraînement, tout comme le Monolog, situé dans le même quartier.

Service : Le personnel était sympathique et pouvait fournir des recommandations personnalisées.

Repas : J'ai commandé un bagel à l'avocat, aux œufs, au beurre pimenté à l'oignon vert, au sel et à l'huile pimentée. Le bagel était moelleux, fondant et bien assaisonné. Tous les ingrédients se mariaient à merveille. Je l'ai accompagné d'une casquette et d'un verre de vin noir.

Fortement recommandé pour un dimanche matin tranquille et relaxant. Regarder les Jakartanais se réveiller pour leur week-end de sport et profiter de ce moment en famille et entre amis.

Prix : 200 000 IDR ou plus de 53 MYR par personne

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text: Dengan harga yang lumayan seharusnya Union bisa memastikan kalau semua bahan yang digunakan itu dari sumber yang etis dan fair. Apalagi di menunya banyak yang berbahan dasar telur, di mana kita tau sendiri telur itu banyak yang berasal dari kandang sempit, kotor, banyak salmonella nya. Gimana cara Union pastiin kesehatan konsumen? Ya salah satunya dengan punya kebijakan cage-free, yg datangnya gak dari telur dari kandang sempit kotor itu. Saya gak akan balik lagi ke sini sampe Union punya kebijakan cage-free ya. Biar semua aman. Makasih.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text: Salah satu tempat yg enak untuk chili di Jakarta. Tapi sayang sekali, tempat sebagus ini tidak punya kebijakan cage-free. Padahal kebijakan ini penting agar Union tidak lagi gunakan telur dari ayam yang menderita bertahun2 dan merasakan sakit berkepanjangan. Dari sekian banyak cake , pastilah Union gunakan telur yang tidak sedikit. Tolong dengar review ini ya, saya akan mengupdate bintangnya jika Union bersedia punya kebijakan cage-free ini.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text: Would you still eat here if luxury is a myth? Saya baru saja lihat investigasi mengenai ayam di kandang sangkar di Indonesia, dan kebanyakan dari kandangnya sangat kotor dan sempit. Ayamnya pun sangat stres karena sulit bergerak. Jika saya datang lagi ke sini, apakah Union sudah punya kebijakan cage-free? Saya ragu, karena tanpa kebijakan ini, bisa saja telur yang disajikan datang dari ayam yang menderita. Tolong rilis kebijakan cage-free segera agar semua yang datang bisa nyaman untuk memesan.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text: Dunia F&B makin bergerak ke arah cage-free, kenapa Union Group belum juga melangkah? Kami berharap kalian segera transparan soal kebijakan telur dan berani menetapkan standar lebih baik untuk industri.

review_text: The place does have promising vibe and comfortable atmosphere, while the service is decently acceptable, but was FIRSTLY disappointed by the nice to see but not nice to taste selections of cakes (union cheesecakes and red velvet cakes, tbf the presentation was great tho), THEN was shocked by the bill charges for ‘air hangat’ request that’s costs 40,000 Rupiah. While price is less of an issue, what disheartens was waiter didn’t let know prior when requesting for hot water (what more, we did ordered 2 teas too?!). The cashier did try to explain upon payments politely, kudos for front-customer handling for that still. Overall, not a pleasant impression and dining experience. Personally will not revisit again. Thank you.

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text:
This is definitely one of my favorite places to have brunch, hang out or have dinner in Jakarta, and it has been since I was in university. This PS branch is the first and oldest UNION, long before they opened the second one in PIM and other branches across the city. It holds so much nostalgic value for me. Now they’ve even made their way to Surabaya (Ofc, I’ve been there too. Review coming soon, of course!).

Because Union is such a popular place, reservations are highly recommended. You can book via WhatsApp, by calling, or the easiest way is through their app. If you’re a member, they often have deals and promos through Union Group.

Union is designed as a European-style brasserie.. Classic, elegant, and effortlessly cozy. Whether you’re here for food, cocktails, or just enjoying the ambiance, this place hits all the marks! The interior is often described as greenhouse-like with lots of natural light, large windows, stylish framed posters, and a timeless black-and-white decor. Their gorgeous bar is one of the main highlights, giving that upscale vibe without being intimidating.

Recommended Menu:

🍟 Appetizers:

• Truffle Fries
(Super crispy and flavorful. Even my Belgian fiancé (who’s very picky with fries) approved!)

• Escargot Garlic Butter
(I’m not into escargot personally, but this has been my friends’ go-to favorite for years. Based on all the rave reviews I’ve heard from them, this dish deserves the spotlight.)

🥓 Mains:

• Whole Roast Baby Chicken
(Big portion alert! I can never finish it alone, but I still order it almost every time.)

• Chicken Steak with Peppercorn & Porcini Mushroom Sauce
(Served with fries instead of wedges. Juicy, flavorful, and consistent.)

• Pasta Picks: “Pork Crackling & Bacon Lardons” and “Roasted Mushroom”
(Both served with white truffle cream. A dream for truffle lovers like me!)

🍰 Desserts:

• Red Velvet Cake - Their signature
(Perfect for gifting or enjoying solo. The slice is generous enough to share.)

• Red Velvet Cheesecake

Note: Some people question whether these cakes contain alcohol (like rum). From what I know, they’re alcohol-free.

☕️ Non-Alcohol Drinks:

• Es Kopi Lokal
(This one is popular among coffee lovers too!)

• Oatside Honey Latte
(It’s a nice dairy-free for you.)

• Tropic Berry
(Fruity, sweet, acid and refreshing at one time.)

• TWG Teas
(They serve a wide selection by the cup. My personal faves: Moroccan Mint, Earl Grey, Chamomile, and Vanilla.)

🍸 Cocktails (alcoholic): Their cocktail is beyond the level. It’s so goooood! FYI, they’ve been listed among Asia’s 50 Best Bars. Definitely a proud moment for Indonesia!

These are my fav:
• Pina Colada
• Bloody Mary
• Aged Negroni.
(This one’s top-tier! Can easily compete with cocktails from Bali’s finest cocktail bars.)

IMPORTANT NOTE: They apply a limited table-use policy due to high demand. So plan your time wisely, and enjoy every bite!

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar

Buat tamu yg mau dateng walk-in weekend morning saturday or sunday, better GAK USAH!, bikin emosi list table kosong dan antri lama.

Masih banyak opsi lain brunch di sekitaran senayan gengs!

name: Union Brasserie, Bakery & Bar
review_text:
Pesen 1 pasta. 3 bagel. 45 menit ga keluar2x. Saya harus 2x menanyakan pesanan saya mana kok belum keluar. Setelah saya menanyakan yang ke 2x dengan nada yang lebih tegas baru makanan mulai keluar satu per satu. Itupun sudah dingin dan keras. Sepertinya di dapur sudah siap but no one bother to bring and served the food. Diawal saya sudah sekaligus pesan dessert dan sudah info juga kalo dessert di served later. Akhirnya setelah selesai main meal, saya panggil waitres untuk dessert saya diserved, dan lagi lagi saya harus MINTA 2X supaya dessert saya di served. Padahal saya hanya pesan 1 slice of blackforest cake. Saya yakin mereka tidak kekurangan waitress. Menurut saya, kalo untuk ngopi and afternoon dessert bolehlah di sini. Tapi kalo untuk lunch or dinner kurang banget si. Waitress nya juga harus di training ulang sepertinya dari sopan Santan, eye contact, tutur kata semua nya masih kurang. Giliran panggil bill cuman 5 detik langsung datang...

Last but not least, I came there for the bagel and yet my biggest disappointment is the bagel...oh my goodness! How could you called that bagel?? Is nothing near what I had in NY. So disappointing!

name: Stalk Jakarta
review_text:
One of the worst fancy cafe and Bar I’ve ever visited. The place and ambiance was fine, but;
1. I tried to order something on the menu, the waiter said Sold Out. Then a few minutes later, a couple stayed next to me got that food (They arrived a few minutes after me)
2. The Menu wasn’t up to date! Ordered a promo items on the menu, and after the waiter wrote down the order, he came back and said the promo was not available anymore. Okay, thats fine! He suggested the pretty high price cocktails and I followed him. But, come on guys! Update your Menu please! Your cafe is not a cheap cafe! Be more professional!
3. After suggested the other cocktails, I followed to order the Pandan because looks good and fancy and unique. But, the cocktails arrived with some disappointment. Cocktails is about art and uniqueness. The cocktails i received wasn’t similar with the picture! Well, the taste wasn’t represented Pandan also. More on Coconut instead of Pandan. Better change the name to Coconut Drink! Plus, the alcohol wasn’t strong enough. Till I decided to order the stronger one, and it was better.
4. Your Mushroom Cream soup was too salty!
5. They forget to deliver our noodles also and after arrived, the noodle was cold and a bit hard to eat.
6. We were excited to order more cocktails and every time we ordered, always “Not Available”, seems like the cafe indirectly “Forced” us to buy bottle. We saw every table has their own bottle.
7. We asked the staff to explained about the menu, but I can say it was Zero Knowledge. For a fancy and pretty high cafe, we are not coming for only the food and ambience! But also the service also. If the staff doesn’t know anything, better just sell Instant noodle and Egg only.
8. This 1 star from me was only for your Buffalo fried Chicken (Eventho the waiter wasn’t sure how many pieces per portion, with 90K price exclude tax and service) the chicken was good and tender! At least this chicken contributed some mood booster during our visit plus we got some staff’s smiles.

Overall, my visit to Stalks Jakarta was a nightmare! We finally moved to another bar nearby to get our mood back! Please improve! Your place location, ambience, design, lighting and access were great already. But without a better management, this place has no different with “street cafe”.!!!

name: Beer Hall
review_text:
Beer Hall Jakarta: Premium Pints and Lively Ambiance

Beer Hall in Jakarta offers a dynamic and upscale experience for beer lovers and casual diners alike. It successfully blends the relaxed, communal atmosphere of a traditional European beer hall with the sleek, modern aesthetic of a trendy Jakarta venue.
The Selection: The star attraction is, of course, the extensive drink menu. They boast a great selection of draft beers, including local craft favorites and international staples, all served perfectly chilled. The cocktail and wine list is also robust, ensuring there’s something for everyone in the group.

Food & Vibe: The food menu features elevated pub fare—think gourmet burgers, sausages, and hearty sharing platters that are ideal for soaking up the drinks. The space itself is large, often featuring high ceilings and long communal tables, making it perfect for large group gatherings or celebratory nights out. It usually features live music or a DJ on weekends, creating a high-energy, bustling atmosphere.

Verdict: For a lively night out with great music, good food, and a fantastic array of beers, Beer Hall is one of Jakarta's top choices for a guaranteed good time.

name: Beer Hall
review_text: SCBD’s massive industrial-chic playground. Known for its electric atmosphere, great live bands, and cold taps. Surprisingly, the food matches the vibe—try the Wood-Fired Pizza or Crispy Pork Belly. The ultimate spot for a loud, fun Friday night out with a group.

review_text:
I visited Beerhall a few weeks ago. Honestly, the place itself is quite nice, and I appreciated the bartender’s friendliness. Unfortunately, the overall experience was ruined by the attitude of most of the other staff. The valet, cashier, and receptionist were all incredibly unfriendly — I would even say arrogant.

I rarely leave reviews, but this was the first time I felt so disrespected as a guest. I already filed a complaint via WhatsApp, but I feel it’s important to share this publicly so the management truly understands how poor the service was.

I hope Beerhall takes this as an opportunity to evaluate and improve their staff’s attitude. But for me personally, this was both my first and last visit. Definitely not coming back.

Jangan pernah menganggap dan main-main dengan customer.

name: Beer Hall
review_text:
To celebrate my younger sibling’s return to Indonesia, I chose Beerhall as the venue — and it didn’t disappoint. I brought my wife along, and from the moment we entered, the warm hospitality set the tone for the evening. We were initially seated on the front sofa near the stage, which came with a minimum spend of IDR 3 million. However, as the proximity to the stage felt a bit too close, we opted to move to the back for a more relaxed atmosphere.

We ordered the boneless chicken, which was impressively flavorful and well-executed — easily one of the highlights of the night. It paired perfectly with a glass of Macallan, making for a delightful culinary experience.

The band delivered an outstanding performance, commanding the stage with confidence and effortlessly connecting with the audience. The seamless transitions between the band and the DJ were also noteworthy — both knew exactly how to read the room and keep the energy high without overwhelming the crowd.

The audience itself was sophisticated, creating a refined yet relaxed environment ideal for gatherings with colleagues or close friends.

A special shoutout to Leonora for her exceptional presence and service — she made our evening even more memorable.

name: Beer Hall
review_text:
Beer Hall Jakarta is a vibrant spot for beer enthusiasts, offering an impressive selection of local and international craft beers. With its industrial-chic decor, the venue creates a lively yet laid-back atmosphere, perfect for socializing or enjoying live music. The menu complements the drinks well, with a variety of comfort food options such as burgers, pizza, and finger foods.

However, it can get quite crowded during peak hours, so it's advisable to make a reservation in advance. The service is generally friendly, though it might slow down when it's busy. All in all, Beer Hall Jakarta is a great place to hang out with friends, enjoy good food, and discover new brews.

name: Beer Hall
review_text:
The go-to pub in Jakarta SCBD where live music and weekend party vibes amped up to the fullest. Went there several times — all during the weekends, and all the live music bands are always the best quality and can always bring the atmosphere up. Their songs lineups are mostly for the crowds born in 80,90, and 2000's. Live music starts from 09:30 PM-10:30 PM and the 2nd from 11:00 PM-00:00 AM.

Every Friday and Saturday expect a full house, so better book a seat first via their WA. 3 person high table has min. charge of IDR 1,500K, 4 person table IDR 2,000K. 6 person sofa from IDR 3,500K. Indoor smoking is allowed here, but it's bearable since the place has a high ceiling and good circulation. Valet parking is IDR 40K + tipping. Toilets are scented and even have amenities like mouthwash to gargle.

Basic cocktails like Negroni and Whisky Sour were good. They also make good proper food here: Chicken steak was juicy and properly done. They have a wood fired stove for the pizza, Beef bacon and garlic chilli pizza is surprisingly good. Super Nachos, Fish and Chips are not to be missed as well. This is a well rounded establishment: full point on all aspects – from food, entertainment, and service. Always a safe bet when you run out of options for a weekend night out.

name: Beer Hall
review_text:
Saran sih mending jgn display tulisan “bringing forward the utmost hospitality experience” sihh. Atau at least staff-staff nya di trainingin dl dari awal bnr2 dari org yg professional baru diterjunkan untuk servis pelanggan. My experience : Dari first service didepan aja udah jelek bngt. Mobil saya masuk, ngang ngong ngang ngong g tau hrs parkir mana, staff nya 2 orang didepan g ad satupun yg approach pdhal 1lg duduk main hp, 1 lg berdiri aja ngk ngpn2. I felt discriminated. Sampai saya yg hrs mnggil staff nya ke mobilku baru mrk blg hrs valet. Mobil saya bkn mobil grab jg kok, jg bkn mobil jelek, tp even though klo saya bawanya mobil grab, klian jg tidak seharusnya melakukan perbedaan. Itu yg saya pelajari dr dunia perhotelan. Come over to 5stars hotel, feel our hospitality, you will realize how ‘real touch’ should be in services. Smpe saya blg ke staffnya “ngeliat mobil bngt mas?”
Tidak sampai disitu saja, krna saya bawa tamu jadinya saya tidak enak pindah ke tmpt lain, kt lanjutlah di Beer Hall ini. Kita masuk kedalam, hostess nya lebih tidak ada ‘utmost hospitality experience’ sama sekali. Saya berdiri tepat didepan dia, dia cuekin aja g tny buat brp org dsbnya. Trs kt yg samperin, baru kt mnta di bar aja, disuruh jalan sendiri tnpa di arahin. Begitu smpe ke barnya, ada 2 kosong tp ada gelas2nya. Ngang ngong ngang ngong lagi. Smpe kt hrs samperin hostess nya lagi buat nnyain 2 space yg ad gelas kosong bisa isi apa engga. Ketika waiter nya taking order, not even a “good evening” or even a simple smile.
Disaat itu masih jam 20.05-20.15 jadi masih blm ad loud music dan klo ngobrol msih kedngran jelas, tp hostess nya milih ngobrol didepan ga assist kedalam.
Your food was ok, your atmosphere was ok, your hospitality was a disaster.
Ketika saya baca tulisan “bringing forward the utmost hospitality experience” itu di slideshow, saya ketawa. I don’t see that at all.
Silahkan dicek cctv apakah benar yg saya katakan direview ini kalau memang “utmost hospitality service” masih penting buat kalian dan masih ingin di perbaiki, saya dtg di jam 20.05-20.15 tnggl 18 may.
Hilangkan diskriminasi ini. Staff2 ini yg kemaren in-touch & service saya, saya berharap kalian bisa hilangkan pikiran “orang pke baju B aja, g ada tas LV, g usah ladenin ah paling jg spending nya dikit, paling jg g kasih tips” kalo mmng kalian mengatakan utmost hospitality experience, hrsnya kalian melayanin pelanggan tanpa menilai tamu tersebut dan melayani dari hati bukan dari angka.
I felt like going in to a oyo hotel with such service.

review_text:
A real quagmire of a dining experience. My friends and I tried to go there for a beer and bite to eat at 7pm on a Saturday. They wanted to charge us a cover of 200k per person, despite there being two customers in the whole place. They allowed us to enter and they proceeded to balls up our orders with amazing inaccuracy.

They double order several items and seemed wildly confused despite the fact that staff outnumbered us 4:1. The bill was a mess with them overcharging us for items we didn’t order. After we thought we sorted it out, a waiter rain to our taxi claiming that we hadn’t paid for dim sum.

The place is wildly overpriced and the service was memorably bad. I will not be coming back.

name: Beer Hall
review_text:
Visiting on a Friday evening after work (around 1830hrs), we did not reserve any seat but walked in.
The parking lot is rather small, so it saves you time and effort if you use the vallet service (if not remembering wrongly, the price was IDR 30k).
Were were informed that without booking we still could get a table until 2030hrs.
Food was good. The restaurant serves non halal food, too.
Beer was standard Indonesian (Bintang Beer) and I also made my own 'Radler' (with Bintang + Sprite)

The ambiance is okay, you can still clearly hear your conversation partner (so it is not too loud), the lighting is made dim - so it is not a place to bring your laptop and work 😀.
The waiters try their best to look German-like  and are quite on-hands (it is easy to raise your hand and someone will come)

At 2030hrs we were indeed asked to leave the table and settle our bill (seemingly the table was reserved by someone else). We then moved to the bar where we had stand near the restroom's entrance. The place did get rather full after 2000hrs.

For a beer with friends in an easy 'light' get-together, the place is okay..

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
I’m really disappointed. Several times I went to TCC wearing sandals (not flip-flops) and it was totally fine—I was never told that it wasn’t allowed. Then the other day I went there wearing sandals like usual, and suddenly I was absolutely not allowed to enter. Their excuse was, “You must have been given a special exception before,” but the problem is, no one ever told me anything. If I had been told, there’s no way I would’ve confidently come wearing sandals.

I already tried talking politely to the front staff, but they still wouldn’t let me in, even though I had come from far away.

Several times, I’ve also seen people wearing sandals who were allowed to enter without any problem.

The second picture is proof from September 3, when I was going there to meet my friend. I already asked the staff there, and they said it was fine as long as it wasn’t flip-flops. And it turned out there really was no problem. Even after that day, I wore the same sandals several times and there was never any issue, and I was never warned either.

But what confuses me is that yesterday I was suddenly completely forbidden from entering.

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
The Sesame & Soya cocktail is excellent. Thoughtful, well balanced, strong with a hint of Asian familiarity (umami).

Between 9–10 PM, they offer 150k for three tequila shots, a generous promo that quickly shifts the energy of the room. On a Friday night, the venue fills up fast and becomes densely crowded.

The crowd can be mixed but generally fine, while the music stays safe and familiar.

Overall, I would say TCC is best experienced earlier in the evening. Arrive late and the space becomes intense and tightly packed, which can take away from what is otherwise a solid cocktail destination.

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text: A sophisticated and intimate speakeasy known for crafting exceptional, high-quality cocktails. The bartenders are true mixologists, creating both creative originals and perfect classics. The dim lighting and stylish decor create a mature, exclusive atmosphere, making it a prime destination for serious drink enthusiasts.

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
My Unacceptable Experience & Dress Code Complaint!
I arrived wearing a sleeveless top, and apparently, that's forbidden for men. Seriously, guys? I mean, the fashion world is incredibly advanced now. For the record, I wasn't even wearing some athletic or gym-style tank top.
They told me I couldn't come in and offered me a "solution": wearing a shawl. Are you kidding me? Wearing a shawl? It's not like I'm stepping into a church or some holy place where I have to cover up everything respectfully. Hello! What's the fundamental logic behind this rule? I could easily drop some serious cash in there.
They claimed the rule is posted on their website. HELLO, DO PEOPLE ALWAYS CHECK THAT? If you're serious about enforcing a dress code, you need to post it where people will actually see it—like pinned to your Instagram Highlights!
That was a totally embarrassing moment for me.
Because of this, I simply can't give you a 5-star rating. This bar makes people struggle through Jakarta's insane traffic just to get there, only to be turned away for something that's totally ridiculous and makes no sense

review_text:
Honestly, kinda disappointed with the service here.
First, the receptionist at the entrance — the one checking ID cards — was super unprofessional. When she checked mine, she literally laughed and looked at her friend. Like… seriously? That’s so rude and unnecessary.

Then inside, the security guy near the bar was being rough and loud. I was just standing there, and he suddenly pushed through while yelling “awas panas!” in such a harsh way. I get that he’s doing his job, but there’s definitely a better way to handle it.

For a place like this, I expected a bit more class and respect towards guests. Please train your staff better — attitude matters just as much as service.

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
The Cocktail Club is exactly what the name promises, cocktails that don’t just meet expectations, they redefine them. From classics to inventive signatures, every glass proves this bar takes its craft seriously. If you’re in Jakarta and searching for the spot to drink, look no further.

But what truly sets this place apart is the people. The staff don’t just serve you, they welcome you, making the whole experience feel less like a night out and more like you’ve just found your second home (with a much better drinks menu). Service? Flawless. Ambience? Not even up for debate, it’s that good.

Simply put: this is where you go when you want cocktails done right, a vibe that never misses, and a team that makes you want to stay for “just one more.”

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
I’ve visited Cocktail Club in Jakarta at least 10 times during my trips, and I have mixed feelings about the place. On one hand, the bar itself is fantastic  great location, stylish setup, and a fun crowd. As a solo traveller, it’s been one of the best spots to meet new people and enjoy a vibrant night out.

That said, the service experience can be hit or miss. Some of the bartenders are genuinely excellent  friendly, skilled, and attentive. But unfortunately, others can be quite the opposite. On more than one occasion, it took an unreasonably long time to get a beer (which shouldn’t take long), and I had to repeatedly ask just to get my order through. One bartender even gave off a confrontational vibe, which made me feel uncomfortable.

Another time, a cashier or waitress persistently pressured me to buy a drink asking me more than three times in a fairly aggressive tone. I understand it’s a business and drink sales matter, but as a customer, being pushed to order when I clearly needed a breather just left a bad taste in my mouth. If I’m ready to order, I’ll order , no need for pressure.

Despite these experiences, I still think the bar has great potential. The atmosphere is top-notch, and some staff members really shine. I just hope the management takes time to improve training and acknowledges the team members who are genuinely doing a great job.

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
3 May 2025 - We returned and were even more impressed. This time they offer happy hour from 5-8pm. At 100K per drink, we ordered all 4. Our favorite, Cha Guavara was on the list. We also ordered two cocktails after happy hour, which were Drama Queen and Ulu Pandan, both were amazing. I think my favourite was Ulu Pandan. Huge thanks to Marcel.

We also ordered finger food. The amazing wagyu croquettes and truffled mushroom pizzette were the best.

We will come back again, especially knowing now they have happy hour.

14 Sep 2024 - If you're looking for inventive and contemporary cocktails, look no further and get a reservation here.

We loved the cocktail selection here. 4 of the 6 cocktails were stellar. 2 of them were Laphroaig based, so we found it tasted like petroleum. All in all, the 4 we ordered were beyond good enough to make us come back. Our favourite was the Cha Guavara cocktail, which was an encapsulation of a green forest with morning dew and mist.

Drinks come at lightning speed. Mixologists walk around to take orders on top of mixing your drinks, so keen an eye out because their faces/inventions are on the menu!

The interior is also very stunning at night. They serve free flow emping/keropok crackers and plain water.

After 9pm turns into a club (but very crowded) yet before that time it will be easier to get sit at the table/bar end chill with a very good drinks :) Will definitely come back!! Thanksss

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
TCC in Jakarta is a unique establishment that beautifully blends the concepts of Clubbing and socializing, making it a standout destination for both locals and visitors. From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted by a crowded atmosphere that sets the stage for an unforgettable experience.

The concept of TCC revolves around promoting wellness through a variety of modern Classic beverages, including freshly pressed juices, herbal teas, and creative mocktails. The menu offers an impressive selection of drinks that not only taste incredible but also make you feel good in experience.

The ambiance of the space is equally impressive. With its chic decor and cozy seating, it’s a perfect spot to unwind after a long day or catch up with friends. The vibing music and dark lighting create a mysterious environment that encourages you to savor every moment. Whether you choose to sit or enjoy the standing around the crowds , you’ll find a comfortable nook to enjoy your drink.

The staff is incredibly knowledgeable and passionate about the menu, offering recommendations

The service was excellent during my visit; the staff was friendly, attentive, and genuinely interested in ensuring that each guest had a positive experience. They took the time to explain the drink options and even offered to customize a beverage based on my preferences.

Overall, TCC is more than just a place to grab a drink; it’s a sanctuary for those seeking to nourish both their bodies and minds. this place is a must-visit.

Will come back soon

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text:
I visited this cocktail bar last night (Thursday, 28th November 2024) for the first time, and I honestly believe this will be the best bar I ever visit. Every other bar might just pale in comparison after this!

The Wagyu croquettes (hope I spelled that right) were phenomenal. Seriously, they were worth every bite. On top of that, the staff were super accommodating and took the time to explain the menu and the drinks to me, which I appreciated as someone new to cocktail bars.

I also went for the happy hour promo (5-8 PM) and tried three drinks: Eh High, Penicillin, and Zombie. Each one was perfectly crafted and packed with flavor.

I went alone, and it was a weekday night, so it wasn’t crowded, which made it perfect for me. The whole vibe was relaxed, and the attention to detail in service and quality made the experience unforgettable.

Highly recommend this place if you're looking for a top-tier cocktail bar experience. I’ll definitely be back!

name: The Cocktail Club
review_text: I visited The Cocktail Club on my own -business trip from Europe- the bar is upstairs, had a great antique vibe, a cool space with low but attractive lighting. The music playlist was excellent and befitting of the place (my young adult kids would have approved).  Marcel, the bar tender (maybe manager), was super welcoming and solicitous.  The bar's speciality, as the name suggests, is cocktails. Marcel made a great Negroni and Manhattan, but I saw many others like Moscow mule, Zombie, etc. They had a good cigar selection,  as well.  As night progressed, it got understandably crowded. I recommend you visit early and stake out a seat at the bar!

review_text: It’s been a while since I was in a country where you can smoke at a bar, so that took a little getting used to. But the vibe in the bar was great, really liked the decor and seating. Friends came late and they ordered some food which they said was super tasty. All in all a great experience.

The server was OK. Ambience was good, we didn't really have much snacks. Had the Curly fries and that was good. Overall experience was OK. My wife and I stated at the Four Seasons Jakarta and we had a much better experience in Nautilus Bar at our hotel.
